summary: Software Engineer with experience developing production ERP systems and scalable backend applications. Skilled in REST APIs, database design, Docker, and collaborative development. Top student in his year with a high GPA (3.8/4.0), known for exceptional attention to detail, writing clean code, and designing coherent systems.

highlights: Owned the development, maintenance, and deployment of ERPNext/Frappe-based ERP systems.
Extended and stabilized an existing ERPNext codebase by implementing business features, custom modules, and Phase 2 ZATCA e-invoicing improvements.
Designed a centralized authentication portal and configurable white-labeling system, improving maintainability across ERP deployments.
Automated VPS deployments with Docker, Nginx, GitHub Actions, and SSH while managing deployment environments.
Developed secure backend applications using Spring Boot, JWT, MySQL, and MongoDB.
Implemented automated testing and containerized applications with Docker.
Built and deployed a scalable API for an inventory management SaaS (Nest.js, MongoDB).
Implemented multi-tenant database architecture to streamline client data management.
Completed a 12-month software engineering program specializing in back-end development.
Developed full-stack web applications while designing relational and NoSQL databases using modern backend frameworks.
Applied Linux, Git, agile workflows, and test-driven development in collaborative software projects.

projects.name: SmartGallery (Graduation Project)
highlights: Led a five-member team developing an AI-powered Android gallery application.
Designed the MVVM architecture and implemented semantic search and image indexing.
Converted MobileCLIP2-S0 to ONNX and reduced the text encoder from 224 MB to 61 MB.
Enabled fully offline semantic, face, and OCR search, indexing 1,000 images in approximately 15 minutes.

projects.name: Learning Management System
highlights: Built a web platform for managing courses and assessments (Spring Boot, PostgreSQL).
Designed normalized schemas and integrated Cloudinary for media management.

projects.name: Doodles
highlights: Developed drawing-sharing web app (Next.js, React, Prisma, MongoDB, NextAuth).
Implemented authentication, database optimization, and image storage with Cloudinary.

projects.name: Sports Club Center
highlights: A web application for managing club activities and tracking players' records (Flask, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, MySQL, Git).
Designed and implemented RESTful API and backend functionalities using Flask.
Developed and optimized database schemas and queries using SQLAlchemy with MySQL.
Designed and implemented a console-based admin interface for database management.
